title: Daytime co-host gets surprise proposal
text: and do you have a favorite engagement story i know somebody who might need to be you know thinking about an engagement sometime soon but do you have a favorite story well to be honest miranda my favorite story i'm not sure has happened yet okay i i i just wanted to do this and good morning my love you know when we first started going out i told you that i was your biggest fan and then sometimes you didn't really believe me i mean we went to auditions together and i saw your shows and i told you that i saw greatness in those beautiful eyes whenever you walk into a room and smile everybody used to be like wow look at those teeth and then they couldn't stop smiling and then halfway through our relationship well i say halfway but you know the army said they had to deploy me and i asked you for a favor i said can you hold on just a little bit well you still came to europe and we traveled around the world together for those amazing three months so it's been a while since then you know covered and the like and we survived so i'm asking you for one more favorite so i just wanted to tell you that i love you i love you too miranda chelsea rodin brooks will you marry me yes you look great you look great [Music] it's about time thank you congratulations thank you so much thank you i'm so happy for you uh what you guys celebrate
